The '''Professional Greenputt Tour''', abbreviated '''PGT''', was one of the many professional [[greenputt]] leagues<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_2.html|Yet Another Greenputt League}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> It was overseen by the [[Greenputt Governing Council]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Professional Greenputt Tour was first mentioned in the [[in-universe]] news story "Yet Another Greenputt League," which was published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']],<ref name="HNN" /> a [[March 14]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]].<ref name="HNN" /> The issue was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
